html:
Exclusive to:

The Raft is a craftable Boat in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 4 Bamboo and 3 Vines to craft and is found in the Nautical Tab at the start of the game. It has a durability of 150, which will deplete over time or if damaged. It can be repaired with the Boat Repair Kit or Sea Yard. The Raft cannot have attachments.

Occasionally, abandoned Rafts can be found floating in Shallow Ocean biomes, accompanied by 1 Spear gun.

Tips

  • The Log Raft and the Raft share the same amount of durability, the only difference is that the Raft is faster.

Like the Log Raft, the Raft is useless for Walani, because her Surfboard only has 50 less durability, it has 1.5 more speed.



DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bè là một chiếc Thuyền có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó cần 4 Tre và 3 Dây Leo để chế tạo và được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng Hải khi bắt đầu trò chơi. Nó có độ bền là 150, độ bền này sẽ cạn kiệt theo thời gian hoặc nếu bị hư hỏng. Nó có thể được sửa chữa bằng Bộ Sửa Thuyền hoặc Sân Biển. Bè không thể có phụ kiện đính kèm.

The '''Raft''' is a craftable [[Boats|Boat]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires 4 [[Bamboo]] and 3 [[Vine]]s to craft and is found in the [[Nautical Tab]] at the start of the game. It has a durability of 150, which will deplete over time or if damaged. It can be repaired with the [[Boat Repair Kit]] or [[Sea Yard]]. The Raft cannot have attachments.

Occasionally, abandoned Rafts can be found floating in Shallow Ocean [[biome]]s, accompanied by 1 [[Spear Gun|Spear gun]].

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
* The [[Log Raft]] and the Raft share the same amount of durability, the only difference is that the Raft is faster.

Like the Log Raft, the '''Raft''' is useless for [[Walani]], because her [[Surfboard]] only has 50 less durability, it has 1.5 more speed.
